cars.name: V12 Goblin
cars.description: The goal of this project was to create a unique, visually striking modern supercar with abundant detail.

cars.name: Tokii Abyss GT.7 V12
cars.description: Part of the hypercar exhibition sponsored by Nyx Motors and their ReVision project, aimed to bring out the most in automotive companies. Running a supercharged V12, Tokii Abyss can clock in a total of anywhere between 900-1500 horsepower, depending on the variant.
